apps.name: Feather
apps.versionDescription:
Thank you for all your feedback and contributions!

> [!TIP]
> For `idevice` configuration, you can use [Impactor](https://github.com/claration/Impactor?tab=readme-ov-file#pairing-file) for easily retrieving a pairing file for installing!

## What's Changed
* Added support for Catalyst targets.
* Added ability to rename existing certificates.
* Added Arabic localizations by @mohammed1d1 in https://github.com/CLARATION/Feather/pull/624

## New Contributors
* @mohammed1d1 made their first contribution in https://github.com/CLARATION/Feather/pull/624

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/CLARATION/Feather/compare/v2.7.0...v2.8.2
apps.localizedDescription: CLARATION 的 Feather 客户端，轻量强大的侧载工具。

versions.localizedDescription:
Thank you for all your feedback and contributions!

> [!TIP]
> For `idevice` configuration, you can use [Impactor](https://github.com/claration/Impactor?tab=readme-ov-file#pairing-file) for easily retrieving a pairing file for installing!

## What's Changed
* Added support for Catalyst targets.
* Added ability to rename existing certificates.
* Added Arabic localizations by @mohammed1d1 in https://github.com/CLARATION/Feather/pull/624

## New Contributors
* @mohammed1d1 made their first contribution in https://github.com/CLARATION/Feather/pull/624

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/CLARATION/Feather/compare/v2.7.0...v2.8.2

apps.name: Kazumi
apps.versionDescription:
- 新增默认设置重置功能 (#2176) (@Predidit)
- 调整播放器HUD布局 (#2164) (@Predidit)
- 修复 iOS/windows 平台截图可能导致崩溃的问题 (#2146) (@UzawaReisaQwQ @Predidit)
- 修复吐槽编辑页面的布局错误 (#2142) (@UzawaReisaQwQ)
- 改进的 Bangumi 同步错误提示 (@Predidit)
- 其他构建系统改进 (@LiggMax)
apps.localizedDescription: Kazumi 是一款基于手机端的番剧搜索与播放工具。
